input.description: Show diffs for ticket T7 files

content.text:
Implemented `T7` from `docs/development-plan-v1.md` section `12.2` end-to-end.

- Added `POST /api/v1/memory-media/:mediaId/sign-read` in `apps/api/src/app.ts`.
- Enforced playback authz with deny-by-default checks:
  - requires `practice_id` on token,
  - checks media ownership scope (`client_id`/`client_ids`),
  - enforces `CLIENT_SELF` narrow-scope behavior,
  - returns `403` when media is outside caller visibility.
- Added media lookup + playback signer abstractions with defaults:
  - DB-backed media lookup (joins `memory_media` + `memories`, excludes soft-deleted rows),
  - short-lived read URL signer for playback.
- Added regression tests in `apps/api/src/app.test.ts`:
  - allowed media returns signed read URL (`200`),
  - out-of-scope media returns `403` with request id.

Tracking/docs updated:
- Marked `T7` as complete in `docs/development-plan-v1.md` (`DONE 2026-04-30`).
- Added implementation entry in `docs/implementation-log.md`.
- Added `@types/pg` to `apps/api/package.json` (and lockfile update) to satisfy typecheck.

Validation run:
- `npm run typecheck --workspace=@memories/api` ✅
- `npm test --workspace=@memories/api` ✅ (19/19 passing)

input.description: Show changed files after T8 T9 work

content.text:
Completed both prompts in order: `T8` then `T9`.

- Implemented `T8` in `apps/api/src/app.ts`:
  - Added `POST /api/v1/clients/:clientId/memories` with idempotent finalize.
  - Supports `Idempotency-Key` header (or `idempotency_key` in body).
  - Enforces Stage `0.5` media limits: max `1` image + max `1` audio.
  - Added strict payload validation and memory mutation authz checks.
  - Added default DB-backed repository logic with audit event writes for create/update/delete.

- Implemented `T9` in `apps/api/src/app.ts`:
  - Added `GET /api/v1/clients/:clientId/memories` (cursor pagination).
  - Added `GET /api/v1/clients/:clientId/memories/:memoryId` (detail).
  - Added `PATCH /api/v1/clients/:clientId/memories/:memoryId` (allowed field updates).
  - Added `DELETE /api/v1/clients/:clientId/memories/:memoryId` (soft delete).

- Added/updated regression tests in `apps/api/src/app.test.ts`:
  - Idempotent replay returns same `memory_id`.
  - Over-limit media payload returns `400`.
  - Cursor pagination behavior.
  - Patch role authz baseline (`CLIENT_SELF` denied).
  - Patch + soft-delete happy path for guide role.

- Updated tracking docs:
  - Marked `DONE 2026-04-30` for both `T8` and `T9` in `docs/development-plan-v1.md`.
  - Added implementation entry in `docs/implementation-log.md`.

Validation run:
- `npm run typecheck --workspace=@memories/api` ✅
- `npm test --workspace=@memories/api` ✅ (`24` tests passing)
